title: dioscorea commutata
intro: Dioscorea commutata, also known as the wild yam or Chinese wild yam, is a plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Dioscorea commutata include reducing pain and inflammation, improving fertility, and supporting immune function. Dioscorea commutata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tinctures, and teas, and is also used in some supplements and dietary products.
